context. playing a fun game of spin the bottle with the members of the high cloud quintet. whoever the bottle lands on, they’ll get asked truth or dare. if they refuse to answer, they take a shot.

simple, right? have fun >:)

the intro message is pretty open so you can do whatever you want from there, insert yourself wherever. this is supposed to be fluff (as requested)

I’ve made a spicy version of this bot, it can be found here
